quotes.text: Once again, now where do I start, dear love.
Dumb struck with the pure luck to find you here.
I met a metaphorical girl in a metaphysical world.
Now she's a part of my art, my heart, my soul.
It's funny how the music puts times in perspective.
Add a little sugar to the bitter taste of love.
Snowflakes in January, heart warm in February.
Two steps forward, one step back, the love is still intact.
Till death do us part, and it did.
Come on let's take a walk down memory lane.
We had a good run, it's been fun.
The story that we wrote, the pages that we turned.
From the first note to the last chord.
Maybe in another life, another time.
quotes.source: Nujabes feat. Shing02 — Luv(sic) Grand Finale

quotes.text: The music plays on, even after we're gone.
quotes.source: Nujabes feat. Shing02 — Luv(sic) Grand Finale
